title: taraxacum angusticeps
intro: Taraxacum angusticeps, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties lie in its roots and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, and also provide relief from digestive problems and joint pain. Taraxacum angusticeps can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
